design_identity.core_concept: The car is the hero. The interface is just the invisible valet. Everything must feel frictionless, with aggressive contrast for immediate action clarity.

typography.strategy: The Anti-Default Rule. We are avoiding standard Inter for headings. Since this is an Expo app, use a strong sans-serif for headings and a clean sans for body.

fonts.heading: Outfit, Clash Display, or system font heavily weighted (fontWeight: '900')

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Native app screens need breathing room.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3B30] rounded-full py-4 items-center justify-center shadow-md

cards.car_listing: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden mb-6 shadow-sm

inputs.text_field: border border-[#E5E5E5] bg-[#F5F5F5] rounded-2xl p-4 text-base text-[#0A0A0A] font-medium

bottom_sheet.container: bg-white rounded-t-3xl p-6 shadow-lg border-t border-[#E5E5E5]

authentication.layout: Minimalist stack. Giant logo/Title at top. Wide inputs. Prominent Google OAuth button with distinct border.
authentication.actions: Primary red button for JWT login, white/grey button for Google.

home_browse.header: Sticky top nav with user avatar and minimalist title 'Dams Car Rental'.
home_browse.search: Large touch target search bar 'Find a vehicle...'
home_browse.categories: Horizontal FlatList for categories (SUVs, Luxury, Electric) - active state is black pill, inactive is grey text.
home_browse.listings: Vertical FlatList of cars. Huge images, minimal text (Make, Model, Price/day).

car_details.hero: Cover image taking up top 40% of screen. Back button floating top-left.
car_details.specs: Grid of icons (seats, transmission, speed) with minimal labels.
car_details.booking_bar: Fixed bottom view (absolute positioning) with Total Price on left and 'Book Now' red button on right.

booking_map_flow.map_view: react-native-maps taking up 60% of upper screen.
booking_map_flow.controls: Bottom 40% sheet containing datetime picker and pickup/dropoff selectors.
booking_map_flow.payment_toggle: Segmented control or elegant toggle between Stripe and Cash.

admin_panel.layout: Strict grid hierarchy. List of cars with swipe-to-delete or right-side action menu. 'Add New Car' floating action button (FAB).

micro_interactions.active_states: Use TouchableOpacity with activeOpacity={0.7} for all clickable elements.
micro_interactions.screen_transitions: Slide from right for deeper navigation (Stack).
micro_interactions.modals: Use bottom sheet style modals for date selection and payments.

media.instructions_to_main_agent: Use these precise image URLs where applicable. DO NOT USE PLACEHOLDERS. The app should feel premium.

hero_or_splash.description: Drone shot of white sports car for splash screen or hero background

interiors.description: Luxury white interior for detail page

map_placeholder.description: Minimal map texture if API fails or for background elements

development_rules.styling: Use NativeWind (Tailwind className strings) for React Native. If custom styling is needed, use standard StyleSheet.create().
development_rules.icons: Use @expo/vector-icons (Feather or Ionicons) for minimal line icons.
development_rules.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. E.g., <TouchableOpacity testID='login-submit-button'> (Note: React Native uses testID, not data-testid).
development_rules.maps: Use react-native-maps. Render minimal custom map styling if possible via customMapStyle JSON.
development_rules.auth: Implement simple JWT store in AsyncStorage + expo-auth-session for Google.
